name: Catholic Charities
description_short: Catholic Charities is a credit repair provider based in Phoenix, Arizona. Rated 4.2/5 with 67 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Catholic Charities is a credit repair provider serving clients in Phoenix, Arizona. Carrying a 4.2/5.0 Google rating from 67 reviews, Catholic Charities has an strong reputation among consumers in the Phoenix area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a non-profit organization, religious organization, Catholic Charities provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Phoenix, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Catholic Charities operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Phoenix, Arizona area who are considering Catholic Charities should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
